nasb.text: He will also take your male servants and your female servants and your best young men and your donkeys and use them for his work.

esv.text: He will take your male servants and female servants and the best of your young men and your donkeys, and put them to his work.

cnv.text: 他又必徵收你們的僕婢、最精壯的青年和驢，替他工作。

ccb.text: 他会征用你们的仆婢及最好的牛和驴来为他效劳。
